title: megalastrum alticola
intro: Megalastrum alticola, also known as the "alticola megalastrum", is a species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae, commonly referred to as a type of fern. Traditionally, Megalastrum alticola has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, and may also exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Megalastrum alticola may be consumed in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
